title: infinitas-skill reviews.json
description: Validates the reviews.json file that lives inside each skill directory, tracking review requests and decisions.

requests.description: Review requests submitted for this skill.

requested_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the review was requested.

note.description: Optional note accompanying the review request.

entries.description: Review decision entries recorded for this skill.

reviewer.description: Reviewer identifier; must be a configured reviewer (enforced by code).

note.description: Optional note accompanying the review decision.

at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the decision was recorded.
